subject: Fwd: misc
body:
Lance's view about paying Francis severance is that it is not necessary, it  
sets a bad precedent and will not stop him from gossiping.  I am only  
thinking of trying to limit hostility towards you.  Please let me  know.
 
Darren K.  Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New  York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: _dkiesq@aol.com_ (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com)

From: "lance calloway" <lancecalloway@gmail.com>
Subject: Re: misc
Date: Tue, 18 Sep 2007 13:45:04 GMT
To: dkiesq@aol.com

Darren,

not sure severance is even needed but if that is your recommendation.  he
cant do his job and I think if we give him his 2 weeks vacation pay that
would be just fine.  If we give him severance and then later we let someone
else go they will be expecting severance as well.  believe me they will all
know what he is getting.  this firing is based upon job performance and he
doesnt perform, not even 50%.  None of the workers especially Mr Francis
will even know what severance pay is, much less knowing that is to help keep
him from gossiping which if they want to they will no matter what. We just
strongly feel it is a waste of JEE money, and if JEE asks we will tell him
so.

Lance


On 9/18/07, dkiesq@aol.com <dkiesq@aol.com> wrote:
>
> I have asked jee to consider severance to reduce the impact and prevent
> hostile gossip from francis.  As soon as jee responds I will let you know.
> Sent via BlackBerry by AT&T
>
> -----Original Message-----
> From: "lance calloway" <lancecalloway@gmail.com>
>
> Date: Tue, 18 Sep 2007 08:06:13
> To:"DKIESQ@aol.com" <dkiesq@aol.com>
> Subject: misc
>
>
> Darren,
>
> we spoke to the staff this morning and made it clear of what was going on.
>
>
> anything on mr francis annius?
>
> thanks
>
> lance

From:lance calloway <lancecalloway@gmail.com>
Subject:Re: misc
Date:Tue, 18 Sep 2007 13:45:04 GMT
To:dkiesq@aol.com

Darren,
 
not sure severance is even needed but if that is your recommendation.  he cant do his job and I think if we give him his 2 weeks vacation pay that would be just fine.  If we give him severance and then later we let someone else go they will be expecting severance as well.  believe me they will all know what he is getting.  this firing is based upon job performance and he doesnt perform, not even 50%.  None of the workers especially Mr Francis will even know what severance pay is, much less knowing that is to help keep him from gossiping which if they want to they will no matter what. We just strongly feel it is a waste of JEE money, and if JEE asks we will tell him so.
 
Lance

 
On 9/18/07, dkiesq@aol.com <dkiesq@aol.com> wrote:
I have asked jee to consider severance to reduce the impact and prevent hostile gossip from francis.  As soon as jee responds I will let you know.
Sent via BlackBerry by AT&T

From: "lance calloway" <lancecalloway@gmail.com>

Date: Tue, 18 Sep 2007 08:06:13
To:"DKIESQ@aol.com" <dkiesq@aol.com>
Subject: misc


Darren,

we spoke to the staff this morning and made it clear of what was going on.


anything on mr francis annius?

thanks

lance
